description: Snapshot history of the repository by version and Assessment Year. Each entry corresponds to a git tag. From v1.3.0, every entry includes a quality profile per the Governance Charter.

versions.summary: Initial knowledge architecture. Directory structure, all schemas, 5 seed rules (R-0001 to R-0005), 1 decision tree (DT-001), 3 validations, 1 synthetic case, 3 tests, 2 AI prompts.
Scalability modules: Repository Index, Dependency Graph (Section 44AD and 115BAC), Rule Lifecycle, Confidence Model, Conflict Resolver, Rule Authoring Guide. ARCHITECTURE.md extended to Section 15.
Pattern Repository: 8 filing patterns (PAT-001 through PAT-008) covering approximately 95% of individual filers. Pattern schema, pattern-matching doc, pattern registry.

Processing Pipeline (14 stages), 5 Sprint 1 engine specs, Jarviz Accuracy Benchmark (JAB), Decision Replay, Decision Execution Log (DEL), AY2025-26 tax tables, replay/benchmark schemas. Architecture feature-frozen. Governance Charter published.
versions.notes: Architecture declared feature-frozen. GOVERNANCE.md published. Phase 5 (Knowledge Expansion) begins at next commit.
